title: half fool
body:
watched whatcha doin
then i started brewin
the pitchers and vials that you used to
have but haven't been usin
cuz you been in the lab
makin beautiful music witcha new tools
can i get a look
i know you didn't like
what happened last time i saw...dit
aww shit y'all i'm sorry i thought it was cool
if i knew that it would, i wouldn't brought it to school
never thought it would stick
thought it was sick til i caught it
musta come off like a tool
pour a little out for my lack of doubt
now my cup is half fool
i seek sage advice
if that don't work i blaze twice
once for the warmth then again for the light
pray the same er time
dear lord
i need new ways to play nice
cuz i can't always make space
and i can't always find grace
i can't always serve you
i can't always mind me
sometimes i just sync uh my senses especially timing
texture and rhyming
sexual healing, descension and climbing
i'm so grateful for the diamonds you find when you're divin
they make great tools for the depths i'm minin
i'm sayin they fit the shape my mind in
so if we share a bit i bet we get this whole island shinin
